data.title: SilverCrest Metals Hits Record Revenue in Q3
data.description:
SilverCrest Metals (TSE:SIL) has released an update.

SilverCrest Metals Inc. reported a record-breaking revenue of $80.4 million for Q3 2024, marking a 10% increase from the previous quarter, driven by the recovery and sale of significant gold and silver quantities from its Las Chispas Operation in Mexico. The company’s operational efficiency and favorable metal prices have positioned it to potentially exceed its annual silver equivalent sales guidance of 10 to 10.3 million ounces. SilverCrest’s robust financials are further bolstered by a 29% increase in treasury assets, now totaling $158.2 million.

For further insights into TSE:SIL stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: RIWI Corp. Expands Services with TheoremReach Acquisition
data.description:
RIWI Corp (TSE:RIWI) has released an update.

RIWI Corp., a global market research firm, has expanded its capabilities through the acquisition of TheoremReach Inc., enhancing its survey monetization services and expecting to drive growth in revenue and EBITDA. The deal bolsters RIWI’s global data collection platform by integrating TheoremReach’s respondent marketplace, which operates in 53 countries. The acquisition, labeled as the company’s largest to date, is anticipated to produce cost synergies by the second quarter of 2025.

For further insights into TSE:RIWI stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: LiveOne Board Reshuffle as Craig Foster Steps Down
data.description:
LiveOne ( (LVO) ) has shared an update.

Craig Foster has stepped down from his position on the board of directors at LiveOne, Inc. to focus on his other professional commitments. His departure, effective immediately, is not due to any disagreements with the company’s operations or policies. LiveOne plans to appoint current independent board members to the now-vacant committee roles and will also seek a new qualified candidate to join the board.

For a thorough assessment of LVO stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Smart Parking Limited Schedules Virtual AGM
data.description:
Smart Parking Limited (AU:SPZ) has released an update.

Smart Parking Limited has announced their Annual General Meeting (AGM) will be held online via Zoom on 15 November 2024, allowing shareholders to vote and participate virtually. The company, known for its innovative solutions in the parking industry, encourages shareholders to refer to the provided notice for full details and seek professional advice if required before casting their votes.

data.title: Elite Pharmaceuticals’ Generic Adderall® Approved in Israel
data.description:
Elite Pharmaceuticals ( (ELTP) ) has shared an announcement.

Elite Pharmaceuticals has received approval from the Israeli Ministry of Health for its generic version of Adderall®, designed to treat ADHD and narcolepsy. The company will partner with Dexcel Pharma, its exclusive distributor for the Israeli market, to manufacture and package the product under Dexcel’s brand. Dexcel will handle sales, marketing, and distribution and share profits with Elite under specific conditions. The launch date for Elite’s generic Adderall® will depend on various factors, including licensee orders and manufacturing schedules.

For detailed information about ELTP stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Maple Leaf Foods Spins Off Pork Division as Canada Packers Inc.
data.description:
Maple Leaf Foods (TSE:MFI) has released an update.

Maple Leaf Foods has announced the renaming of its pork business to Canada Packers Inc., positioning the new independent entity for a future of sustainable practices and global market leadership. Emphasizing the company’s century-old heritage, the rebranding includes a new logo and color scheme symbolizing a commitment to sustainability. As separate entities, both Maple Leaf Foods and Canada Packers will focus on their respective growth strategies in consumer packaged goods and sustainable pork production.

For further insights into TSE:MFI stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: ProMIS Neurosciences Names Neil Warma Permanent CEO
data.description:
ProMIS Neurosciences ( (PMN) ) just unveiled an announcement.

ProMIS Neurosciences Inc. has officially appointed Neil Warma as its permanent President and CEO starting August 1, 2024, after his interim tenure. Warma’s new employment agreement includes a $500,000 annual salary and a potential 50% bonus, along with stock options that incentivize company performance. With no familial ties influencing his appointment and a clear severance package outlined, Warma’s leadership position is poised to steer the company forward in the competitive financial landscape of the stock market.

For a thorough assessment of PMN stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: KB Home Appoints Cheryl J. Henry to Board of Directors
data.description:
KB Home ( (KBH) ) has provided an announcement.

KB Home has welcomed Cheryl J. Henry to its board of directors, with her term concluding at the company’s 2025 annual meeting. Henry, a former President, CEO, and Chairwoman of Ruth’s Hospitality Group, brings a wealth of executive experience and a track record from the fine-dining industry and public service. Her role on KB Home’s nominating and corporate governance committee and her current board position at Cracker Barrel Old Country Store, Inc. signal her strong influence in the consumer sector, promising strategic contributions to KB Home’s respected and customer-focused homebuilding legacy.

See more data about KBH stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.
data.author: TipRanks Auto-Generated Newsdesk

data.title: Noxopharm Alerts on Option Expiries, Highlights Innovation
data.description:
Noxopharm Ltd. (AU:NOX) has released an update.

Noxopharm Limited announces the upcoming expiry of two sets of unlisted options, with deadlines on 6th November and 15th December 2024, urging option holders to submit exercise forms and payments by the specified dates. The Australian biotech firm, known for its cancer and inflammation treatments as well as its stake in Nyrada Inc, reminds investors of its innovative focus on drug development and mRNA vaccine enhancement technologies.

data.title: Fortress Cove Limited Faces Financial Uncertainty
data.description:
EUDA Health Holdings (EUDA) has released an update.

Fortress Cove Limited, audited by J&S Associate PLT, has reported a net loss of $19,788 and a working capital deficit of $19,311 for the period from its inception on November 2, 2023, to December 31, 2023. The audit raises substantial doubt about the company’s ability to continue as a going concern, indicating significant financial challenges ahead for the newly established entity.

For further insights into EUDA stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.
